description_long: This is a large, L-shaped sectional sofa with a modern, boxy silhouette and deep seating. The upholstery is a sleek, solid black material with a slightly glossy finish, giving it a contemporary and somewhat luxurious appearance. The sofa features five prominent seat cushions and five matching back cushions, all of which appear generously padded and uniform in size. The armrests are straight, wide, and flat, matching the height of the backrest and contributing to the sofa's geometric profile. The base and sides are fully enclosed, with no visible legs, creating a grounded and monolithic look. This sofa would be well-suited for urban environments such as lofts, lobbies, or upscale waiting areas.
description: A large, L-shaped black sectional sofa with a modern, boxy design, deep seating, and a glossy finish. It features wide armrests, uniform cushions, and a fully enclosed base.
description_view_0: Side view showing the sofa's deep seat, straight armrest, and the thickness of the backrest and armrest.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the sofa's long, continuous back and the L-shaped sectional layout.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the shorter section of the L-shape and the uniformity of the armrest and backrest.
description_view_3: Front view revealing all five seat and back cushions, the L-shaped configuration, and the wide, flat armrests.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Five individual, loose seat cushions and five matching back cushions, all uniform in size and arranged in an L-shaped sectional layout.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, wide, and flat armrests at both ends, matching the height of the backrest with a boxy, modern profile and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: No visible legs; the base is fully enclosed, giving the appearance of a solid, grounded structure.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight, continuous backrest with five loose, uniform back cushions and no visible tufting or segmentation.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid black upholstery with a smooth, slightly glossy finish and no visible pattern or decorative stitching.
